title: ulmus fungosa
intro: Ulmus fungosa, also known as the American Elm, is a deciduous tree native to North America. The medicinal properties of Ulmus fungosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ulmus fungosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Ulmus fungosa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
